title: Superior Experience
description: Enhancing vanilla minecraft at its core.
body:
![Key Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c143ab9bef8f40770cb392d3bdadf016538de138.png)

- **Better anvils**
- **Vanilla styled visuals**
- **Fluid, smooth animations**
- **More biomes**
- **More fish**
- **More enchants**
- **Better enchantment tables**
- **QoL features**
- **Improved terrain generation**
- **Trims to tools & weapons**
- **More blocks**

![Why Us?](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed8aedcb9fac599bfeafedcb5644ab42801e6c13.png)

Superior Experience only pick the best fruits, or without the bad analogy, Super Experience has a handful of mods only meant to enhance the vanilla experience, not destroy it. Most "vanilla enhancing" modpacks make the game feel out of place, be it more weapons, more bosses, terrain mods like Terralith, Nullscape, Incedium, etc. I'm not saying these mods are bad, it comes down to your liking of course, but Superior Experience focuses on the core gameplay and visuals. Only adding mods which will make the gameplay feel more fun and less "oh, just another generic Minecraft experience."
